
# Daily Pick – Team Rituals for Stand-ups & Planning

> Lightweight web experiences that help distributed teams stay focused, fair, and energized during stand-ups, retrospectives, planning sessions, and team rituals.

## Core Experience

- [Planning Poker](https://dailypick.dev/apps/planning-poker): Multiplayer estimation with hidden Fibonacci voting, reveal rounds, and Jira/Trello-friendly summaries.
- [Retro Board](https://dailypick.dev/apps/retro-board): Collaborative sprint retrospectives with card creation, voting, drag-and-drop organization, and live updates.
- [Timer](https://dailypick.dev/apps/timer): Multi-stage ritual timers with color-coded stages, audio cues, presets, and shareable cadence links.
- [Wheel of Names](https://dailypick.dev/apps/wheel): Fair spinner for decisions, random selection, and meeting facilitation.
- [Morale Thermometer](https://dailypick.dev/apps/morale-thermometer): Fast team pulse checks for standups and health checks.
- [Settings & Brand Studio](https://dailypick.dev/apps/settings): Centralize rosters, brand presets, third-party integrations, and live previews for theme changes.

## Selection & Decision Tools

- [Random Name Picker](https://dailypick.dev/apps/random-name-picker): Draw names fairly with optional remove-after-pick behavior and history tracking.
- [Random List Shuffler](https://dailypick.dev/apps/random-list-shuffler): Shuffle entries, generate team names, and split groups instantly.
- [Giveaway Winner Picker](https://dailypick.dev/apps/giveaway-winner-picker): Pick lucky winners from lists with simple randomness.
- [Raffle Ticket Puller](https://dailypick.dev/apps/raffle-ticket-puller): Pull tickets fairly for giveaways and team awards.
- [Coin Flip & Dice Roller](https://dailypick.dev/apps/coin-flip-dice-roller): Quick randomizers for decisions and icebreakers.
- [Capacity Dice](https://dailypick.dev/apps/capacity-dice): Estimate team capacity and sprint effort with lightweight dice rolls.
- [Choices Spinner](https://dailypick.dev/apps/choices-spinner): Editable wheels with fairness rules and persistent option lists.
- [Random Letter Generator](https://dailypick.dev/apps/random-letter-generator): Generate letters in various cases and batch sizes for naming and prompts.
- [Random Number Generator](https://dailypick.dev/apps/random-number-generator): Generate integers within a range with optional no-repeat rules.
- [Yes or No Wheel](https://dailypick.dev/apps/yes-or-no-wheel): Spin a simple yes/no decision wheel for fast, fair binary choices.
- [Raceway Randomizer](https://dailypick.dev/apps/raceway): Race-based order picker for meetings, classrooms, and group activities.
- [Office Trap](https://dailypick.dev/apps/office-trap): Eliminate options one by one until the final choice remains — great for team decisions and surprise outcomes.
- [What Drink Should I Choose](https://dailypick.dev/apps/what-drink-should-i-choose): Filtered drink wheel for coffee, tea, smoothies, and quick hydration choices.
- [What Should I Eat](https://dailypick.dev/apps/what-should-i-eat): Meal suggestion wheel with cuisine filters and dietary constraints.
- [What Snack Should I Have](https://dailypick.dev/apps/what-snack-should-i-have): Snack picker with categories for sweet, salty, healthy, and movie-night options.

## Engagement & Team Games

- [Mimic Master](https://dailypick.dev/apps/mimic-master): Prompt-based party game with rounds and leaderboards.
- [Ball Game](https://dailypick.dev/apps/ballgame): Real-time cooperative orb game for team energizers.
- [Gravity Drift](https://dailypick.dev/apps/gravity-drift): Arcade-style drift racing for short, shareable sessions.
- [Speedway](https://dailypick.dev/apps/speedway): Mini racing name picker with podium and celebratory highlights.
- [Trap](https://dailypick.dev/apps/trap): Pixel-themed surprise trap game with fast rounds.
- [Letters](https://dailypick.dev/apps/letters): Falling-letter matching game for quick competition.
- [Truth or Dare](https://dailypick.dev/apps/truth-or-dare): Curated prompts with safe-mode options.
- [Classroom Name Roulette](https://dailypick.dev/apps/classroom-name-roulette): Random name selection for facilitation and classroom participation.
- [Snowball Fight](https://dailypick.dev/apps/snowball-fight): Real-time multiplayer snowball battles with short elimination rounds.
- [Patchinko Machine](https://dailypick.dev/apps/patchinko-machine): Pachinko-style visual ordering tool for fair, playful picks.
- [Two Truths and a Lie](https://dailypick.dev/apps/two-truths-and-a-lie): Collect statements, gather votes, and reveal outcomes live.
- [Would You Rather](https://dailypick.dev/apps/would-you-rather): Quick choice prompts and voting for team discussion.
- [Never Have I Ever](https://dailypick.dev/apps/never-have-i-ever): Icebreaker prompts with voting and sharing.
- [Cook or Order In](https://dailypick.dev/apps/cook-or-order-in): Spin a wheel to decide between cooking at home or ordering takeout.

## Technical Stack

- Eleventy (11ty) static site generator powering site content
- Cloudflare Workers for edge delivery and app hosting
- Durable Objects used for real-time multiplayer sessions across select apps
- Browser-first design with minimal required server storage and privacy-friendly interactions

## Blog & Documentation

Explore guides on agile ceremonies, team rituals, and remote collaboration at [https://dailypick.dev/blog](https://dailypick.dev/blog).

## GitHub & Deployment

- Source: https://github.com/Dimakoua/dailypick
- Live on Cloudflare: https://dailypick.dev
